name: Cutting Board Evil Twin
description: Arrangement-style autocut: silence pass + take detection + refine, applied to an in/out range. Always operates on a duplicated sequence.
author: Trevor May

commands.name: Run Evil Twin
commands.description: Run the full pipeline (silence + take detection + refine) on the active sequence's in/out range. Always duplicates the sequence first.

commands.name: Transcribe Range
commands.description: Transcribe the active sequence's in/out range using the configured transcript source

commands.name: Silence Pass Only
commands.description: Run only step 1 (call into Silence Remover plugin) on the duplicated sequence

commands.name: Detect Takes Only
commands.description: Run only step 2 (heuristic + LLM tiebreak) and return cut candidates without applying

commands.name: Apply Take Cuts
commands.description: Apply user-approved take cuts to the duplicated sequence

commands.name: Refine Cuts Only
commands.description: Run only step 3 (normalize all cut boundaries to standard pre-roll/ramp)

commands.name: Validate: Duplicate + Range Delete
commands.description: Step 4 validation harness — duplicates the active sequence and ripple-deletes a [startSeconds, endSeconds] range on the duplicate

commands.name: Transcribe + Detect Takes
commands.description: Convenience: transcribe a file with whisper then run the take detector. Returns cut ranges ready for ripple-delete.

commands.name: Debug: Preprocess
commands.description: Returns the transcribed segments before and after splitOnInternalRestarts, for debugging the detector

transcriptSource.label: Transcript Source
transcriptSource.description: auto = use Premiere built-in if available, otherwise Whisper. Or set to 'whisper' / 'premiere' to force one.

anthropicApiKey.label: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Used for LLM tiebreak on ambiguous take clusters. Leave empty to disable LLM tiebreak (heuristic-only).

requireTakeApproval.label: Require approval before cutting takes
requireTakeApproval.description: If true, show the strikethrough transcript review before applying take cuts. If false, auto-apply.

preRollMs.label: Pre-roll (ms)
preRollMs.description: Step 3 — milliseconds of audio to leave before each cut-in point

postRollMs.label: Post-roll (ms)
postRollMs.description: Step 3 — milliseconds of audio to leave after each cut-out point

rampThresholdDb.label: Ramp threshold (dB)
rampThresholdDb.description: Step 3 — audio level a cut-in must reach for the boundary to count

heuristicConfidenceCutoff.label: Heuristic confidence cutoff
heuristicConfidenceCutoff.description: Step 2 — heuristic scores below this go to the LLM tiebreak (if API key set)
